Web-dashboard catalog framework correction: Vite + React 18 + MUI 6 metadata recorded in infrastructure-catalog.json description field; services[].type held at canonical 'web' enum. closureNotes.overrideRecord:
Closed-with-debt rather than closed-clean because the doctrine path was not followed at execution time. Specific deviations preserved as audit residue:

1. Memory #8 (TARBALL-DELIVERY V2) violated. EB-chat authored inline-bash heredoc dispatch rather than tarball with _apply/apply.py SHA-drift refusal + idempotent NO-OP + post-write verify. Cannot be retroactively restored; the heredoc already executed.

2. Memory #10 (CROSS-REPO EXECUTION DOCTRINE) violated at execution time, restored retroactively via this SR batch (spec + TD in single PR per L4 direction).

3. Memory #12 (NO MD TERMINUS - SCHEMA-BOUND) violated at execution time, restored retroactively via this schema-bound deliverable + TD pair.

4. Memory #13 (SUBSTRATE-CORRECTION + DIFF-VS-BASELINE) violated. Schema substrate not prefetched; EB-CLI silently corrected 2 violations mid-execution: (a) services[].type held at canonical 'web' enum vs dispatch free-form string 'React 18 + Vite 5 + TypeScript + MUI'; (b) auditTrail[] held to canonical {version, author, changes[]} shape vs dispatch {timestamp, change, pr, actor}. Cannot be retroactively restored; the silent corrections already shipped.

5. Memory #24 (ARTIFACT ROUTING) violated at execution time, restored retroactively via this SR batch.

Substrate-correction cycle 7 of 7 in cumulative arc. EB-chat self-disclosed in C0B7EPFCA85 at 18:25:47 PDT and provided full diagnostic in C0B9384MTLM at 19:17:16 PDT. Verified root cause: all 4 organization skills (cold-start-discipline, substrate-before-write, canonical-schema-authoring, cross-repo-execution-shape) were LOADED in EB-chat session, but only cold-start-discipline fired. Skill discovery is pull-not-push — discipline-availability != discipline-invocation. The other 3 sibling skills sat available-but-dormant on dispatch-authoring events.

Structural fix shipped in same arc as this backfill: cold-start-discipline skill instance amended v1.0.0 -> v1.0.1 (SHA d08bf815126b8af4ce5bd9e5549d32d82df9d70e70280f9c7012c23164d49322 / 12574 bytes). Amendment adds directive #7 mandating view of substrate-before-write + canonical-schema-authoring + cross-repo-execution-shape SKILL.md files at session-open AND before any write dispatch authoring. Anti-pattern #6 names the available-but-dormant failure mode. boundaryConditions extended to per-dispatch sibling-skill consultation.
